weak_aliases.reason: These are program-specific aliases (ABLE/ACE) for the same base route Q43.

suggested_rules: Merge route records sharing the same route_id/route_label when one is a generic reference and the other is a program-specific variant of the same base route, unless variant labels (e.g., SBS, Limited, +) differ.
rationale: Both records refer to the Q43 bus route in Queens. route_q43 has ABLE/ACE program context and streets (Sutphin Blvd / Hillside Av), while route_q43-queens is a generic reference from a Queens equity evaluation. Both share route_id=Q43, route_label=Q43, and the identity key route_q43. The validator flagged duplicate_global_identity on shared key route_q43. The negative variant mismatch (ace-dataset vs unknown) is not a real conflict since the queens record simply lacks a variant label rather than having a different one. These are the same canonical route.
